meta.title: Savor - Seasonal Dining
meta.description: Farm-to-table restaurant celebrating local ingredients and seasonal menus with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: SEASONAL. LOCAL. UNFORGETTABLE.
sections.subheadline: 20+ local farms. 1 Michelin star. 8 years. 4.9 rating. 95% return rate.

sections.heading: OUR PHILOSOPHY
sections.body: Ingredient-driven cooking. 20+ farms. Weekly menu changes. $2M to local economy.

sections.heading: CURRENT MENU
sections.subheading: Changes weekly based on what's available

items.title: ROASTED HEIRLOOM CARROTS
items.description: Rainbow carrots from Green Valley Farm, roasted with honey-thyme glaze, served with whipped ricotta and toasted walnuts. A celebration of spring's sweetness. Vegetarian, gluten-free.

items.title: PAN-SEARED SCALLOPS
items.description: Day-boat scallops from Pacific Coast, seared to perfection, served with cauliflower purée, crispy pancetta, and lemon butter sauce. Gluten-free.

items.title: GRASS-FED RIBEYE
items.description: 16oz ribeye from Pasture Prime Ranch, dry-aged 28 days, grilled over oak wood, served with roasted potatoes and red wine reduction. Gluten-free.

items.title: WILD MUSHROOM RISOTTO
items.description: Arborio rice slow-cooked with foraged mushrooms, aged parmesan, and truffle oil. Finished with fresh herbs and microgreens. Vegetarian, gluten-free.

items.title: SEASONAL FRUIT TART
items.description: Buttery tart shell filled with vanilla bean custard, topped with whatever fruit is at its peak—currently strawberries and rhubarb. Vegetarian.

items.title: HOUSE-MADE GELATO
items.description: Three rotating flavors made in-house daily. Currently: lavender honey, dark chocolate sea salt, and strawberry basil. Gluten-free, vegan.

items.quote: Best meal in years. Recommended to 20+ friends. They all agree.
items.name: Amanda Foster

items.quote: 50+ visits. Never disappoints. Celebrate every special occasion here.
items.name: David Park

items.quote: Chef Maria Santos is a genius. Heirloom carrots worth the visit. Send students here.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: Michelin star well-deserved. Every course a revelation. Go-to date night spot.
items.name: Michael Torres

sections.heading: JOIN US FOR DINNER
sections.subheading: Tue-Sun, 5pm-10pm. Weekend reservations recommended. Private dining for 20.
